---
title: "Georgina Caroline Gascoyne-Cecil, Marchioness of Sal"
---

## Georgina Caroline Gascoyne-Cecil, Marchioness of Sal

**Dates:** (1827-1899)

**Maiden name:** (Alderson)

### Description

wife of the 3rd Marquess of Salisbury

### Letters

- [To the Marchioness of Salisbury, April 4th 1899](../letters/3402_To_the_Marchioness_of_Salisbury.html)
- Letter from Sept 2d 1887
- Letter from Novr 9th 1881

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
